title: I am coming to the cross
firstLine: I am coming to the cross;
publicDomainBasis: William McDonald (1820–1901), William Gustavus Fischer (1835–1912). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
Chorus
Chorus
sections.text:
Here I give my all to Thee—
Friends and time and earthly store,
Soul and body Thine to be—
Wholly Thine forevermore.

sections.label: Chorus
